string 2: Hmm... HMM...
{next}What is it this time?
{next}Do you often watch movies?
{end}I'll leave you alone. See you.

Ah, I've been waiting for you. There's something else
bothering me about love.

I've got to say, movies are amazing, aren't they?
Something's still bothering me, though!
Hmm...

After all that I've learned, I feel human love's rather
insignificant at its core.

There's no need to let it dictate your actions. That's my
conclusion, anyway.

However, there's one topic in need of further examination...
love between Digimon!
{next}Good point.
{next}Is there no end to this?
{next}Y-You don't say...?

Isn't it? I doubt anyone but me could've come up with the
subject.

Don't say that. After all, I'm a Digimon, right? Surely, we
must consider them, too?

Quit trying to get out of this. You've come this far, so you
can't turn back now.

At any rate, I need to perform more research on love between
Digimon.

Sooooo... If you know of any worthy Digimon out there, be
sure to let me know!

I'm curious to see if meeting them will set my heart
aflutter.
{next}What do you consider "worthy," Minervamon?
{next}And what if they do set your heart aflutter?
{next}There's a good human right in front of you...

Good point... I don't really care about things like facial
structure or body size.

Well, we know that's definitely not going to happen! I
merely wish to prove my hypothesis.

Enough with the lame jokes, already! Now, get out there and
find me someone.

Wait... I really liked that motorcycle in the movie the
other day! It was super cool!

Try to find a Digimon as cool as that! First, we need some
info. Try that kid over there.

The kid's playing a card game, and, as such, probably knows
a lot about Digimon!
Hey! Look at this card I just pulled! It's a Beelzemon!

Ah, yes. It's the only Digimon to ride the human vehicle
called a motorcycle. Way cool!

Oh, look! It's the real, live Beelzemon, standing right here
in front of me...!
I've got your card, Beelzemon! I'm your biggest fan!

If I could just be seen sitting on the bike, I couldn't
imagine anything better...

Wow! It's a motorcycle! I don't think I've ever seen
anything so cool in all my life!

I bet someone like that would be the most popular individual
that ever lived.

Have you brought me a "worthy" Digimon?
Hmm... Not yet, from the looks of it.
Well, I'll be waiting here until you do.
Ah, you're back. Well? Did you find a worthy Digimon for me?
Hm? What's this?
Hm? What's this?
What's the matter with you? You hit your head or something?

What's the matter with you? You hit your
head or something?

I... feel strange, somehow. I guess I'll go try to clear my
head in the sewers.

Ah, there you are. Um... Something came over me back
there...

I feel warmth in my chest, yet tightness and pain at the
same time. What is this feeling?

I'll stay here until I can figure out what this is. Here.
This is for you. Thanks again.

I love playing card games! Next time, I'll show you the very
best card in my collection!
Let's card battle.
{end}I'm too busy right now.
Darn it! I lost! My poor Beelzemon...!
I won! I knew Beelzemon was the strongest.
